evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: betrouwbare data-oplossingen; kwaliteit; duurzame datastructuur; single source of truth
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour dominates: emphasis on reliable solutions, quality, durability, and governance with no velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Sustainability company internal analytics—low risk without financial/compliance/regulatory framing.
evidence.collaboration_width: Finance; Operations; Commercie; centrale datateam van Essent
evidence.data_team_maturity: Databricks, dbt, Power BI; single source of truth; data warehouse
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: named tools (Databricks, dbt, Power BI) and established warehouse/data infrastructure.
evidence.jd_authorship: Ontwerpen, bouwen en onderhouden van datamodellen; Werken met SQL, Databricks, dbt; Bewaken en verbeteren van prestaties, kwaliteit en schaalbaarheid
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tools (Databricks, dbt, Power BI, SQL) and methodologies show hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Finance, Operations, Commerce; business requirements; management and operations dashboards
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Mixed: supporting multiple business functions with internal analytics and commercial operations focus.
evidence.autonomy_level: Vertaalt informatiebehoeften; Zorgen voor; Ophalen en vertalen; Adviseren; Doorvragen op doelstellingen
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Mixed: design and advisory authority in data domain with support to business stakeholders.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI or AI-assisted work expected from candidate.
evidence.testing_framing: kwaliteit; betrouwbare rapportages; bewaken en verbeteren
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality and reliability are named responsibilities but without explicit testing framework.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: betrouwbare data-oplossingen; kwaliteit; single source of truth; duurzame datastructuur
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data quality and reliability are concerns but not compliance/risk-driven.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Ontwerpen, bouwen en onderhouden; Ontwikkelen en optimaliseren
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: focus on building and optimizing existing data infrastructure.
